channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: FG Summons South African Acting High Commissioner Over Attacks on Nigerians in SA
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don summon the Acting High Commissioner of South Africa to Abuja over the recent xenophobic attacks wey dey affect Nigerians and their businesses for South Africa. Ac...

item.title: New Therapy Could Help Repair Osteoarthritis Damage with a Simple Injection
item.description: Osteoarthritis, a common joint disorder affecting millions worldwide, has traditionally had no cure. However, new breakthroughs in regenerative medicine offer hope. Researchers at the University of Co...

item.title: President Ruto Donates KSh 15 Million to Schools in Murang'a County During Church Visit
item.description: President William Ruto visited AIC Githumu in Kandara Constituency, Murang'a County on Sunday, May 3, where he donated KSh 15 million to support education projects. He pledged KSh 10 million specifica...

item.title: Understanding India’s Growing Cybercrime Problem and Its Southeast Asian Roots
item.description: India is witnessing an unprecedented surge in cybercrime, with complaints rising from 71 per day in 2019 to 6,175 per day in 2024. Citizens lost over Rs 11,333 crore to online scams in just nine month...

item.title: Kazuma Okamoto’s two homers power Blue Jays past Twins 7-3
item.description: Kazuma Okamoto had a standout performance as the Toronto Blue Jays defeated the Minnesota Twins 7-3 on Friday night. Okamoto hit a solo home run in the fourth inning and followed it with a two-run hom...

item.title: Letters to the editor on Trump’s idea of ballrooms in every U.S. school and place of worship
item.description: In a series of letters to the editor published on May 3, various individuals share their perspectives on recent comments made by Donald Trump regarding the establishment of ballrooms with bulletproof ...

item.title: An analysis of Raghav Chadha's departure from Aam Aadmi Party
item.description: The political landscape of India witnessed a significant turn in early 2026 when prominent Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) leader and Rajya Sabha Member of Parliament, Raghav Chadha, officially parted ways with...

item.title: Samuel Ogazi Breaks Nigerian 400m National Record with 44.02s in Athens
item.description: Naija athlete Samuel Ogazi, just 19 years old, don show serious talent on Saturday as him run one explosive 400 metres race for the Torrin Lawrence Memorial meet wey dey Athens. The young sprint star ...

item.title: Roxy Horner revisits her wedding dress at a supermarket after marrying Jack Whitehall
item.description: Roxy Horner, the influencer, recently showcased her wedding dress in a rather unconventional setting: a supermarket. The 34-year-old, who married comedian Jack Whitehall, 37, at the 17th-century Eurid...

item.title: Thousands of Seafarers Trapped Near Strait of Hormuz Amidst Blockade
item.description: As the Strait of Hormuz remains closed due to ongoing geopolitical tensions, a severe humanitarian situation is unfolding. Around 20,000 seafarers across 2,000 vessels are stranded in and near the str...

item.title: Key Focus Next Week: U.S. Jobs Data and Berkshire Hathaway’s Annual Shareholder Meeting
item.description: The Wall Street Journal live‑coverage card highlights the main events investors should watch over the coming week, centering on the upcoming U.S. nonfarm payrolls report and Berkshire Hathaway’s annua...

item.title: Fire in Vivek Vihar residential building claims nine lives
item.description: A tragic fire in east Delhi's Vivek Vihar on Sunday claimed the lives of nine people, including a toddler. The fire reportedly started early in the morning at around 3:48 am in a four-storey residenti...

item.title: Meghan and Harry face setbacks in social and commercial circles amid financial pressures
item.description: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex, Harry and Meghan, continue to experience challenges in both social and commercial spheres. Recent reports suggest the couple have struggled to maintain influential conn...

item.title: A. Johnkumar Contests Puducherry Assembly Seat from Mudaliarpet on BJP Ticket
item.description: A. Johnkumar, a senior leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party, is contesting the 2026 Puducherry Assembly election from the Mudaliarpet constituency. Known for his strong influence in the Union Territor...

item.title: Underrepresentation of Africa in Global Clinical Trials Despite High Disease Burden
item.description: A recent study has exposed serious gaps in medical research where Africa, despite bearing about 25% of the global disease burden and 19% of world population, is badly underrepresented in key clinical ...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Defends Uhuru Kenyatta, Criticizes Ruto’s Allies for Attacks
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democracy for Citizens Party (DCP), has publicly come to the defense of former President Uhuru Kenyatta, criticizing some members of the Kenya Kwanza Alliance for launc...

item.title: Police investigate suspicious house explosion in Bristol resulting in two fatalities
item.description: Two adults have died following a suspicious explosion at a residential property in Sterncourt Road, Frenchay, Bristol, at approximately 6.30am on Sunday. Avon and Somerset Police have declared the eve...

item.title: Wealthfront Advisers LLC Invests $174 Million in Biopharmaceutical Company Insmed, Inc.
item.description: Wealthfront Advisers LLC, a well-known investment advisory firm, has recently made a significant move in the financial markets by acquiring a $174 million position in Insmed, Inc., a biopharmaceutical...

item.title: Bea Millan-Windorski Crowned Miss Universe Philippines 2026, Advocates for Filipino Heritage and Environmentalism
item.description: Bea Millan-Windorski of La Union was crowned Miss Universe Philippines 2026, succeeding Ahtisa Manalo. Born on August 15, 2002, to a family of US immigrants, Bea grew up in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, where...

item.title: Mike Sonko Promises Justice for Rongai Man Killed by Girlfriend
item.description: Nairobi – Former Nairobi governor Mike Sonko has spoken out strongly against the murder of Kamau Mungai Gathogo, who was allegedly killed by his girlfriend in Rongai, Kajiado County. Sonko condemned t...
